LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Terrorist02.title: demolitions showman
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Terrorist02.description: [PAWN_nameDef] neutralized IEDs for a frontier bomb disposal unit, until pirates conscripted [PAWN_objective] to breach rival compounds. Now [PAWN_pronoun] compulsively rigs defensive positions with improvised munitions, muttering about "artistic detonations".
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Planetbreaker.title: planetbreaker
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_StaticEater.title: static eater
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_PowderGanger01.title: powder ganger

Now [PAWN_pronoun] compulsively rigs defensive positions with improvised munitions, muttering about "artistic detonations".

Now [PAWN_pronoun] compulsively rigs defensive positions with improvised munitions, muttering about "artistic detonations".

Now [PAWN_pronoun] compulsively rigs defensive positions with improvised munitions, muttering about "artistic detonations".
